rationale: Every record in the sample exhibits unambiguous training signatures: _real_training block with loss, gradients, optimizer state, and learning rate on all 53 samples; no inference fields present anywhere. FLOP/token ratio (~7.7M per token) matches training scale (6× 3.2M params). Uniform step times, flat memory allocation, and visible weight norm drift across heavy-stat checkpoints all confirm training. No credible adversarial relabeling detected.
